seo.title: About | HWH Consulting
seo.description: Georges D., founder of HWH Consulting: 20 years of hands-on experience in security and performance for retail, luxury, and sports. Audit, training, and conferences.

apropos.name: Georges D.
apropos.intro: 20 years of hands-on experience across retail and security, from sport to luxury: expertise dedicated to protecting and driving the performance of your business.
paragraphs: Georges D. built his expertise in the field, at the heart of the security and performance challenges that run through the worlds of retail, sport, and luxury. Twenty years of operational experience have given him a first-hand understanding of what distinguishes a theoretical security strategy from genuinely effective protection.

A former senior officer, he developed an in-depth understanding of risk: crisis management, close protection, securing sensitive information, and coordinating operational teams under pressure. This experience of command and decision-making in demanding situations is now the foundation of his consulting approach.

As a consultant and trainer, Georges now supports companies in assessing their vulnerabilities and developing tailored security protocols. He designs and leads operational training programs for field teams, and regularly speaks at conferences to raise awareness among executive committees and employees about contemporary security challenges, from economic intelligence to cyber threats.

His conviction has always remained the same: security cannot be improvised, it must be built. Anticipating risks, passing on the right reflexes, and durably protecting his clients' activities — that is the mission he pursues through HWH Consulting.
apropos.quote: "Security is not an option, it is the foundation of any lasting strategy. Our mission is to anticipate, train, and protect."

seo.title: Privacy Policy | HWH Consulting
seo.description: HWH Consulting's privacy policy: data collected, purposes, retention period, and user rights.

controller.title: Data Controller
controller.bodyPrefix: The controller of the data collected on this site is HWH Consulting, reachable at
controller.placeholder: [À compléter : forme juridique, numéro SIRET et adresse du siège social]

dataCollected.title: Data Collected
dataCollected.body: When using the contact and booking forms on this site, the following data is collected: name, email address, phone number, message, and, for appointment requests, the requested time slot.

purpose.title: Purpose of Processing
purpose.body: This data is used exclusively to respond to contact requests and to process appointment requests (audit, training, or conference) submitted via the site.

recipients.title: Data Recipients
recipients.body: The data is intended for HWH Consulting. It may pass through technical service providers used for the operation of the site (database hosting, transactional email delivery, calendar management).
recipients.placeholder: [À compléter : liste exhaustive des sous-traitants et de leur rôle, le cas échéant]

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.placeholder: [À compléter : durée de conservation des données collectées via les formulaires]

cookies.title: Cookies and Trackers
cookies.placeholder: [À compléter : précisez si des cookies, outils de mesure d'audience ou traceurs sont utilisés sur le site]

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.bodyPrefix: In accordance with applicable personal data protection regulations, you have the right to access, rectify, delete, and object to the use of your data. You may exercise these rights at any time by writing to

seo.title: Terms of Service | HWH Consulting
seo.description: HWH Consulting's terms of service: presentation of the business, appointment booking terms, and applicable conditions.

purpose.title: Purpose
purpose.body: These terms of service govern the use of the HWH Consulting site as well as the relationship between HWH Consulting and any person requesting its audit, training, or conference services.

activity.title: Presentation of the Business
activity.body: HWH Consulting supports companies in the retail, luxury, and sports sectors on security and performance issues, through three types of services: audit & consulting, conference, and operational training.
activity.placeholder: [À compléter : forme juridique, numéro SIRET et adresse du siège social]

booking.title: Appointment Booking Terms
booking.body: Appointment requests are submitted via the online booking form. Each request is reviewed by the HWH Consulting team and is confirmed or declined by email before any final scheduling.

liability.title: Limitation of Liability
liability.body: HWH Consulting implements the resources necessary for the proper performance of its services. However, its liability cannot be engaged in the event of force majeure or circumstances beyond its control.
